label: Lane C scorer is lane-specific but should reuse Lane B report shell and grader/cache machinery
D1 should compute interSkill 12 plus intraSkill 13 using advisor_recommend and router replay
advisor_validate belongs in runQuality calibration rather than per-scenario D1 scoring
D2 should use Hit@1 Hit@3 Recall@5 and MRR over canonical resource-load ranks
D3 should be computed from tool/resource/token trace costs with null-safe token handling
D4 should be a skill-on skill-off ablation using the existing noop mock llm grader seam
D5 should run before dispatch as a hard-gate static connectivity and contamination scan
report.md must be rendered only from report.json to prevent score/report drift
Headline bottleneck should be the largest single-stage funnel drop-off
Remediation taxonomy should map each finding class to file locus one-line fix and handoff lane
Narrow rename must be stamped into report provenance so stale-root reports cannot become baselines
